v2.3.4.description:
A new release! Listen closely though...

## From now on, these beta versions of Yacht Dice are called Yacht Dice Bliss.
- I made this change so people can play both the core "Yacht Dice" and the beta "Yacht Dice Bliss" in one multiworld.
- Play on https://yacht-dice-ap.netlify.app/. Make sure to click on the yellow "Yacht Dice Bliss" in the archipelago menu to go to the correct version.
- Since the game is now called Yacht Dice Bliss, you'll see that in the yaml as well.
- The `website.zip` contains game files that you can use for both Yacht Dice and Yacht Dice Bliss.

There are no big changes since 2.3.3, just:
- Changed `include_scores` option again, you can now put any number of scores in it as requested. Do note that location 1 through 10 are always in.
v2.3.4.title: Yacht Dice Bliss for Archipelago 2.3.4
